meaning: n.安纳托利亚(亚洲西部半岛小亚细亚的旧称)
examples: There are now 250 industrial zones throughout Anatolia.
The principal territory of Turkey is situated in Asia and called Anatolia.
Nicholas resided in the ancient Lycian town of Myra, located in Byzantine Anatolia.
The casual restaurant, which specialises in the food of southeastern Anatolia, is an ideal lunch destination.
According to Turkish news agency Anatolia, arrests were made in four different regions of the country.
